description: Heavy regional accent + poor line. ASR is uncertain so the critical Call Outcome is Low-confidence — must route to Manual Review via the low-confidence path.
transcript:
Agent: Hello, am I speaking with Murugan? This is about the OMR Chennai project.
Caller: [crackle] ...aamaa... naan... [inaudible] ...veedu paakanum...
Agent: Sorry, the line is breaking up. Are you interested in viewing the property?
Caller: [garbled] ...maybe... [static] ...call... later...
Agent: I'll have someone call you back. Thank you.

Call Outcome.subjective: Line was breaking up; intent unclear, possibly a callback request.
Call Outcome.reasoning_objective: ASR confidence low due to noise; caller may have asked to be called later.

Needs Human.reasoning_objective: Transcript too noisy to trust the automated outcome.
